examples.title: Instance Methods in a Class
examples.description: Defining a basic class with instance methods that operate on object data
examples.explanation: This example demonstrates instance methods which take 'self' as the first parameter. The __init__ method is a constructor that initializes the object's state. Methods can return self to enable method chaining (fluent interface pattern).

examples.title: Class Methods and Static Methods
examples.description: Using @classmethod and @staticmethod decorators for different types of methods
examples.explanation: Static methods don't require self or cls and act like regular functions within a class namespace. Class methods receive cls as first parameter and are useful for alternative constructors. Class variables (company_name) are shared across all instances.
